title: AA Batteries - Alkaline 1.5V - Up To 100% Extra Life - Reliability For Everyday Devices - 10 Year Shelf Life - LR6 MN1500, 40 Count (Pack of 40 - Resealable Box Pack)
features: Fuji Energy AA High Energy Alkaline Batteries 1.5v LR6 MN1500 (Produced in the UK) - Pack of 40 Batteries
Guaranteed High Performance, Reliability and Long Lasting Power
Convenient Resealable Box Pack Keeps Unused Batteries Safely Stored Away
FUJI ENERGY High energy AA batteries. Provides the long lasting power needed for energy-hungry devices such as torches, wireless equipment and digital measuring devices

FUJI ENERGY High Energy Alkaline batteries give you the freedom to enjoy the use of your appliances by giving you a product you can rely on and are best used when you are looking for reliable, long lasting power in regularly used devices such as, portable games consoles, shavers, remote controls, CD players, motorized toys, flashlights, toothbrushes, etc.
description: The FUJI ENERGY High Energy AA / MN1500 is a great value single use Alkaline battery. HIGH ENERGY BATTERY DETAILS (AA ALKALINE BATTERY): ype : AA Designation IEC : LR6 Shelf life : 10 years Nominal voltage : 1.5 V Impedance : 120 m-ohm @ 1 kHz Typical weight : 24 g (0.8 oz) Typical volume : 8.4 cm3 (0.5 in3) Terminals : Flat Storage temperature range : 5ºC to 30ºC (41ºF to 86ºF) Operating temperature range : -20ºC to 54ºC (-4ºF to 130ºF) NCLUDES: 24 X FUJIENERGY Batteries (24X Single Cell Battery) Replaces : MIGNON, ND62S, STILO, 15A, 15AC, 4006, 815, AA, AM3, E91, KAA
